patch.value: Prepare, verify, publish, and document the next pm CLI release from changes since v2026.5.1-2, including migration compatibility and telemetry/Sentry review.

Previous-version tracker data migrates without loss; telemetry and Sentry data are reviewed with no secrets committed; release changelog and generated GitHub release notes cover changes since v2026.5.1-2; local and GitHub release gates pass; npm/npx and bun/bunx installation paths are verified after publication.

value.author: codex-release-agent
value.text: Duplicate check before create: ran pm context --limit 10; pm search 'release 2026.5.2 changelog telemetry migration' --limit 10; pm list-open --limit 20; pm list-in-progress --limit 20; pm get pm-x6ni; pm search 'release readiness workflow npm publish GitHub release' --limit 10. No active release item matched; prior release item pm-x6ni is closed and the latest audit lineage is pm-23me -> pm-2eb3.

value.author: codex-release-agent
value.text: Release is blocked until a temporary project created with the previous published CLI version is verified against the current build for automatic migration/backward compatibility.

value.author: codex-release-agent
value.text: Release audit finding before fix: temp previous-version compatibility passed with no tracker-data migration breakage. Telemetry stack is healthy via /healthz (queue depth 0, one consumer, 5,783 events in last 24h), but ignored private helper scripts have endpoint/payload drift. Sentry currently has 8 unresolved high-priority groups, all expected PmCliError usage/validation failures, so Sentry capture must filter expected CLI errors before release.

value.note: filter expected CLI errors before Sentry capture
optional Sentry sourcemap upload in release workflow
version and Sentry CLI release scripts
ignored private telemetry and Sentry audit report
Sentry filter and release workflow contract regression
restore 100 percent coverage for vector dimension mismatch warnings

value.author: codex-release-agent
value.text: Release evidence: previous-version compatibility passed in /tmp/pm-release-compat-final-E1GAqT with @unbrained/pm-cli 2026.5.1-2 items read and mutated by current 2026.5.2; comments, notes, learnings, linked files/docs/tests, reminders, events, and close_reason were preserved and validate ok=true. Telemetry check: API /healthz ok, Grafana reachable, RabbitMQ pm.telemetry.events depth 0/0 with 1 consumer, Postgres 33,387 total events and 5,783 events in the last 24h. Sentry check: 8 existing unresolved groups were handled PmCliError usage/validation failures; release fix filters expected PmCliError from exception capture and adds optional Sentry release/sourcemap upload. GitHub release environment now has NPM_TOKEN and SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN configured without exposing values. Local gates passed: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile, pnpm build, pnpm typecheck, pnpm test (82 files/1089 tests), pnpm test:coverage 100%, node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage 100%, pnpm version:check --verify-next, pnpm security:scan, npm pack --dry-run, pnpm smoke:npx, release notes generation, and pm test pm-5jw8 --run --progress. Validation: resolution metadata ok, normalize dry-run clean; history drift warnings remain limited to six legacy items.

patch.value: Prepared and verified @unbrained/pm-cli 2026.5.2 with previous-version tracker compatibility, telemetry/Sentry remediation, release workflow hardening, changelog/docs updates, and complete local release gates.

2026.5.2 can be published through the GitHub release workflow with previous-version tracker data preserved, release notes generated from CHANGELOG.md plus pm data, and npm/npx/bunx/GitHub verification after publication.

Local release gates passed; previous-version tracker compatibility passed; telemetry stack and Sentry were reviewed; expected Sentry CLI errors are filtered; optional Sentry sourcemap upload is configured; release notes generated successfully.
2026.5.2 release candidate prepared and locally verified; final publication will be performed by the GitHub Release workflow tag.
